introSection: Vortex (ซูเปอร์เกลียวเหาะมหาสนุก, Super Kliao Ho Maha Sanuk) is a steel inverted roller coaster located at Siam Park City in Bangkok, Thailand. Like Boomerang, this ride was moved from Jerudong Park in 2007. It is one of only two 787m Extended SLC installations from Vekoma, the other being Suspended Looping Coaster at Suzhou Amusement Land.
fullText: Vortex (ซูเปอร์เกลียวเหาะมหาสนุก, Super Kliao Ho Maha Sanuk) is a steel inverted roller coaster located at Siam Park City in Bangkok, Thailand. Like Boomerang, this ride was moved from Jerudong Park in 2007. It is one of only two 787m Extended SLC installations from Vekoma, the other being Suspended Looping Coaster at Suzhou Amusement Land.
